name: Subscription Billing Console
description: Manage customers, plans, invoices, renewals, and delinquency recovery.
backend_requirements: Customer subscription model with plan_name, lifecycle_status, renewal_date, monthly_amount, failed_payment_count, and account_owner
Invoice model with issued_at, due_at, paid_at, amount_due, balance_remaining, and retry_state
GET /api/subscriptions with lifecycle, plan, owner, and delinquent filters plus search and pagination
POST /api/subscriptions and PUT /api/subscriptions/:id with validation for billing amounts and renewal dates
GET /api/subscriptions/:id/invoices and POST /api/invoices/:id/retry for collections workflows
GET /api/public/stats and GET /api/public/featured for MRR, churn-risk, and recent recovery summaries
frontend_requirements: Landing page with MRR, renewal, and delinquency stat cards
Browse page with lifecycle tabs, plan filters, and invoice health indicators
Subscription detail page with invoice history and retry actions
Dashboard with owner queues, upcoming renewals, and failed payment alerts
Admin panel for pricing oversight and delinquent account review

api_endpoints.description: List subscriptions with search, filters, sorting, and pagination
Return invoice history for a subscription

admin_requirements: Admin pricing dashboard with plan distribution and churn-risk breakdown
Manual retry and escalation queue for delinquent invoices

admin_api_endpoints.description: Admin subscription revenue and risk dashboard
